title: mentha × elliptica var. variegata
intro: Mentha × elliptica var. variegata, also known as variegated peppermint, is a rare and ornamental variety of peppermint, characterized by its distinctive mottled or variegated leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and soothe respiratory problems, thanks to its high concentration of menthol and other volatile oils. The health benefits of Mentha × elliptica var. variegata include relief from headaches, nausea, and irritable bowel syndrome, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve cognitive function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
